title: MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides payee services. 125 N 17th Street Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who receive federal and state benefits such as Social Security, Veterans Benefits, and Railroad Retirement Benefits. Priority is given to those with limited income and assets. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (503) 397-3511 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 397-3511 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Columbia County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Services: Representative Payee Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING PROGRAMS HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING REHABILITATION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - VETERANS SERVICES OFFICE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - RCI REACH UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
